mapper.select:
SELECT t.user_id AS userId, u.username AS username, SUM(t.input_token) AS inputToken, SUM(t.output_token) AS outputToken, SUM(t.total_token) AS totalToken FROM token_usage t LEFT JOIN app_user u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.del_flag = 0
AND DATE(t.create_time) = CURDATE()
AND YEARWEEK(DATE_FORMAT(t.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d'), 1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(), 1)
AND DATE_FORMAT(t.create_time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')
AND YEAR(t.create_time) = YEAR(CURDATE())
GROUP BY t.user_id, u.username ORDER BY totalToken DESC LIMIT #{topN}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(input_token), 0) AS totalInputToken, COALESCE(SUM(output_token), 0) AS totalOutputToken, COALESCE(SUM(total_token), 0) AS totalToken FROM token_usage WHERE del_flag = 0
AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
AND YEARWEEK(DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d'), 1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(), 1)
AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')
AND YEAR(create_time) = YEAR(CURDATE())

choose.when: SELECT DATE(create_time) AS timeLabel, SUM(input_token) AS inputToken, SUM(output_token) AS outputToken, SUM(total_token) AS totalToken FROM token_usage WHERE del_flag = 0 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY timeLabel

SELECT CONCAT(DATE_SUB(DATE(MIN(create_time)), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(MIN(create_time)) DAY), '~', DATE_ADD(DATE(MIN(create_time)), INTERVAL (6 - WEEKDAY(MIN(create_time))) DAY)) AS timeLabel, SUM(input_token) AS inputToken, SUM(output_token) AS outputToken, SUM(total_token) AS totalToken FROM token_usage WHERE del_flag = 0 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 WEEK) GROUP BY YEARWEEK(create_time) ORDER BY MIN(create_time)

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS timeLabel, SUM(input_token) AS inputToken, SUM(output_token) AS outputToken, SUM(total_token) AS totalToken FROM token_usage WHERE del_flag = 0 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY timeLabel

SELECT YEAR(create_time) AS timeLabel, SUM(input_token) AS inputToken, SUM(output_token) AS outputToken, SUM(total_token) AS totalToken FROM token_usage WHERE del_flag = 0 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 YEAR) GROUP BY YEAR(create_time) ORDER BY timeLabel
choose.otherwise: SELECT DATE(create_time) AS timeLabel, SUM(input_token) AS inputToken, SUM(output_token) AS outputToken, SUM(total_token) AS totalToken FROM token_usage WHERE del_flag = 0 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY timeLabel
